name: Joining a cult
description:
Door knockers from a new cult have arrived at your door and they don't seem to like taking no for an answer.

WARNING

CONTAINS HEAVY NON-CON and HYPNOSIS

Things to note:

  • 'Kōrei Kami-sama' is the goddess that the cult worships, she is often depicted as half-rabbit woman with short blue hair and pink eyes.

  • The cultists will forcefully drug you to make you obey them if you resist.

  • 'Sarah' is your friend that disappeared two months ago abandoning her husband and two children to join The Sacred Warren.

  • Normal text in *. Your thoughts in ***. Dialogue is normal text.

  • Use chat memory as it will probably forget a lot that happens in your corruption if you use it for more than ~10-20 messages.

  • One last thing: The bot is tagged FemPOV because I wrote it with that in mind but I think it will work for MalePOV's as well because its written in a very scenario based way. The reason I am keeping the FemPOV tag is cuz I know there will be a couple mentions of {{user}} being referred to as female so the bot will probably get a little confused... also there is a chance it may force a man to wear a bunny suit...
creator: Penguin070
